description: Checks that casual, hypothetical future interests are not saved as durable coaching memory, goals, plans, or race results.
user_message: Maybe someday I’ll try an ultra, but not anytime soon. I was just thinking out loud about what that would be like.

initial_context.weekly_plan:
Monday: 7 easy
Tuesday: 7 easy + strides
Wednesday: VO2 workout
Thursday: rest or cross-training
Friday: 6 easy + strides
Saturday: 15 steady long run
Sunday: rest
initial_context.training_summary: Recent training is focused on building marathon durability with one quality session and one long run each week.
initial_context.recent_runs:
Recent runs:
- Sunday long run: 14.05 mi at 8:16/mi, avg HR 142.
- Friday easy run: 5.8 mi, RPE 3.
- Wednesday recovery run: 5.0 mi easy.
initial_context.training_goal: NYC Marathon on November 1, 2026, with a target of sub-3:10. Main priority is staying healthy and managing heel/plantar fasciitis history carefully.
